calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar May-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted. The court takes judicial notice of the complaint and its attachment, the promissory note on which this action is based. Defendant carries her burden of showing that the parties agreed to arbitrate, and plaintiff offers no opposition. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
